extraction_notes: Compiled graph preserves parent-child offering hierarchies (Gemini franchise, YouTube premium services, Pixel device family, GCP platform components) as supported by the memo. 'Content creators' omitted from CustomerTypes as not in closed canonical list. Android-specific OEM channel captured as differentiated from segment defaults. Gemini treated as cross-segment parent offering without direct segment anchoring per memo specification. No specific named companies identified for PARTNERS_WITH relations.
